feat.name: Storm Retribution
feat.text: You lash out, directing a burst of storming fury toward a creature that has harmed you. You cast *tempest surge* on the triggering opponent and push that creature, moving it 5 feet away from you if it fails its Reflex save, or 10 feet if it critically fails. This movement is forced movement.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.

feat.trigger: An opponent adjacent to you critically hits you with a melee weapon or melee unarmed attack
feat.requirement: You have at least 1 available Focus Point
